SLOT rmhConfigToggles INSERT {
    property bool rmhGlossaToggle: false
} END SLOT

SLOT rmhShareToolFoldoutModel INSERT {
    ~&425121728314878811&~.~&432643201877711221&~ {
        ~&5972374&~: rmhToggleGlossa
        ~&233748328658231&~: ~&7082020628281&~.rmhDocumentTogglesHack
        ~&214632764553&~: ~&6504222003&~("Glossa")
        ~&8399601734642709923&~: "qrc:/ark/icons/open_book"
        ~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~
        ~&8400129127120172259&~: ~&6504329801&~
        ~&7713561545874130&~: ~&7082020628281&~.rmhGlossaToggle
        ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
        ~&254542236275632405&~: {
            ~&7082020628281&~.rmhGlossaToggle = !~&7082020628281&~.rmhGlossaToggle;
            ~&7082020628281&~.rmhWriteFile("file:///tmp/glossa_armed", ~&7082020628281&~.rmhGlossaToggle ? "1" : "0");
        }
    }
} END SLOT
